description: Adar library registry — community libraries for the Adar styling language

tailwind-adar.description: Tailwind CSS utility classes ported to Adar — spacing, colors, typography, layout, shadows, and responsive utilities
tailwind-adar.author: Adar

daisy-adar.description: Component library for Adar inspired by daisyUI — buttons, cards, badges, alerts with themeable design tokens
daisy-adar.author: Adar

material-adar.description: Material Design 3 components for Adar — buttons, cards, chips, dialogs, typography scale, elevation system
material-adar.author: Adar
